name: MarkFlow Color System
description: Warm-neutral light-mode design tokens for MarkFlow KMS. All values target the default light theme.

bg.description: Page background — warm off-white. Applied to <body> and page-level areas.

surface-2.description: Secondary surface — hover state background, input fills, section backgrounds.

surface-3.description: Tertiary surface — pressed states, skeleton loader, dividers.

border.description: Default border for cards, inputs, panels. 1px or 1.5px.

border-2.description: Emphasis border — hover on inputs, focus ring alternative, stronger separators.

text.description: Primary text — near-black warm. Page headings, body, nav items.

text-2.description: Secondary text — medium warm gray. Labels, descriptions, sidebar items.

text-3.description: Tertiary text — hint, placeholder, caption, muted metadata.

accent.description: Brand primary blue. Buttons, links, active states, focus borders.

accent-2.description: Accent background — active sidebar item bg, selected state, button hover.

accent-dk.description: Darker accent — button hover, pressed state, strong link color.

teal.description: Info/neutral positive. Used for embed badges, API-related UI, teal workspace avatars.

teal-lt.description: Teal light background — badge fills, info panels.

green.description: Success / confirmed / saved. Save status indicator, approval badges, plan checkmarks.

green-lt.description: Green light background — success banner, approval badge bg, prev/next doc nodes.

amber.description: Warning / pending / caution. Saving status, pending join requests, expiry warnings.

amber-lt.description: Amber light background — warning panels, invite pending, CSS phase warnings.

red.description: Error / danger / delete. Destructive buttons, form error states, error toasts.

red-lt.description: Red light background — danger zone panel, error banners.

purple.description: Special / role emphasis. Owner/Admin role badges, embed code accents, related-doc nodes.

purple-lt.description: Purple light background — role badge fills, related doc SVG nodes.

code-bg.description: Code block background (reuses --text token). Dark surface for syntax highlighting.

code-keyword.description: Syntax keyword color (blue-300) — import, const, function, return.

code-inline-text.description: Inline code text color (reuses --red). Renders inside --surface-2 background.

node-root-fill.description: SVG diagram — root workspace node fill.

node-root-stroke.description: SVG diagram — root workspace node border.

node-parent-fill.description: SVG diagram — parent category node fill.

node-parent-stroke.description: SVG diagram — parent category node border.

node-current-fill.description: SVG diagram — current (active) document node fill.

node-current-stroke.description: SVG diagram — current document node border.

node-current-text.description: SVG diagram — text on current document node.

node-prevnext-fill.description: SVG diagram — previous/next document node fill.

node-prevnext-stroke.description: SVG diagram — previous/next document node border.

node-related-fill.description: SVG diagram — related document node fill.

node-related-stroke.description: SVG diagram — related document node border.

edge-solid.description: SVG diagram — solid edge (parent hierarchy, sequential links).

edge-dashed.description: SVG diagram — dashed edge (related document links).

arrowhead.description: SVG diagram — arrowhead fill for directional edges.

blue.description: General info badges, Team plan, New document tag.

amber.description: Pending state, invite waiting, phase warning.

gray.description: Neutral/default badge — version number, viewer role.

user-default.description: Default user avatar background — purple gradient.

dark-mode-preview._note: Phase 2 planned. Values are design intent, not yet implemented.

workspace-css-vars._note: CSS custom properties exposed to workspace-level theme overrides (--mf-* namespace).
